About Me

Designing with Purpose & Passion

Hi! I'm Christine — a Graphic Designer, Social Media Virtual Assistant, and Video Editor based in the Philippines with 4+ years of experience helping brands look amazing and grow online. I specialize in crafting compelling visual identities, high-converting landing pages, scroll-stopping social content, and engaging short-form video edits that resonate with audiences and drive real results.

From concept to execution, I bring strategic thinking and creative vision to every project — whether it's building a brand from scratch, managing social platforms, or producing videos that make people stop scrolling.

Brand Identity Social Media Landing Pages E-commerce Video Editing GoHighLevel
What I Offer

Services Built to Elevate Your Brand

✦

Graphic Design

From logos and brand kits to social graphics and marketing materials — I create visually cohesive designs that communicate your brand story with clarity and impact. Every pixel is intentional.

◈

Social Media Content

Strategic content creation, scheduling, and community management across Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and more. I craft content calendars and visuals that build audiences and drive engagement.

▣

E-commerce Creatives

Product listings, promotional banners, ad creatives, and store visuals designed to convert browsers into buyers. I understand e-commerce psychology and design with sales in mind.

🎥

Video Editing

Short-form video edits optimized for Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts — with smooth cuts, captions, transitions, and music sync. Compelling content that stops the scroll and keeps viewers watching.

⬡

Landing Pages (GoHighLevel)

High-converting landing pages built in GoHighLevel with strategic layouts and mobile-optimized designs — crafted to capture quality leads and drive action for your business goals.

Video Editing

Short-Form Content That Converts

I create high-engagement short-form videos tailored for Reels, TikTok, and Shorts — with punchy edits, smooth transitions, dynamic captions, and strategic pacing designed to maximize watch time and audience retention. Watch a sample client testimonial reel below.

CapCut Reels TikTok YouTube Shorts Captions Motion Graphics
